---
title: "Replication of Mian, Sufi and Verner (2017), Figure I"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

## 1. Configuration

```{r setup}
library(dplyr)

knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = TRUE,
                      fig.width = 12, fig.height = 4.2, dpi = 150)

# Accepts either the replication ZIP or the extracted VAR3_levels_fixedeffects_IVprctiles.csv.
input_file <- "/Users/boxiaowang/MSV_ReplicationKit_20170307/Matlab/VAR3_levels_fixedeffects_IVprctiles.csv"

# The paper uses 2,000 draws in both stages; smaller values are only for testing.
n_boot_bias <- 2000L
n_boot_ci   <- 2000L

workers <- 10L

# Iteration settings from the Matlab program.
bias_tol  <- 0.0015
bias_step <- 0.5
max_bias_iterations <- 50L

# One BLAS thread per worker prevents CPU oversubscription.
Sys.setenv(OMP_NUM_THREADS = 1,
           OPENBLAS_NUM_THREADS = 1,
           MKL_NUM_THREADS = 1,
           VECLIB_MAXIMUM_THREADS = 1)

# L'Ecuyer-CMRG gives workers reproducible independent streams; Matlab uses a different stream.
RNGkind("L'Ecuyer-CMRG")
set.seed(1)

```

## 2. Helper functions

```{r functions}
# Within-demeaning is equivalent to country fixed effects and faster in repeated regressions.
within_demean <- function(M, group, n_group) {
  group_sum <- M |>
    rowsum(group, reorder = FALSE)
  group_n <- group |>
    tabulate(nbins = n_group)
  group_mean <- group_sum |>
    sweep(1, group_n, "/")
  M - group_mean[group, , drop = FALSE]
}

multi_ols <- function(X, Y) {
  qx <- X |>
    qr(tol = 1e-10)
  if (qx$rank < ncol(X)) stop("The regression matrix is rank deficient.")
  qx |>
    qr.coef(Y)
}

fit_fe_var <- function(Y, X_lag, group, n_group) {
  X_dm <- X_lag |>
    within_demean(group, n_group)
  Y_dm <- Y |>
    within_demean(group, n_group)
  beta <- X_dm |>
    multi_ols(Y_dm)

  unexplained <- Y - X_lag %*% beta
  group_n <- group |>
    tabulate(nbins = n_group)
  alpha <- unexplained |>
    rowsum(group, reorder = FALSE) |>
    sweep(1, group_n, "/")
  residuals <- unexplained - alpha[group, , drop = FALSE]

  list(beta = beta, alpha = alpha, residuals = residuals)
}

# Actual initial lags are retained to match the authors' conditional bootstrap.
simulate_panel <- function(beta, innovations, X_initial, group,
                           group_sizes, p, alpha = NULL) {
  T_obs <- nrow(X_initial)
  n_y   <- ncol(beta)
  X_b   <- matrix(0, T_obs, n_y * p)
  Y_b   <- matrix(0, T_obs, n_y)
  starts <- cumsum(c(1L, head(group_sizes, -1L)))

  for (i in seq_along(group_sizes)) {
    idx <- starts[i] + seq_len(group_sizes[i]) - 1L
    X_b[idx[1], ] <- X_initial[idx[1], ]

    for (k in seq_along(idx)) {
      r <- idx[k]
      fixed_effect <- if (is.null(alpha)) 0 else alpha[i, ]
      Y_b[r, ] <- drop(X_b[r, ] %*% beta) + fixed_effect + innovations[r, ]

      if (k < length(idx)) {
        X_b[idx[k + 1L], ] <- c(Y_b[r, ],
                                X_b[r, seq_len(n_y * (p - 1L))])
      }
    }
  }

  list(Y = Y_b, X = X_b)
}

cholesky_irf <- function(beta, Sigma, p, horizon = 10L) {
  n_y <- ncol(beta)

  # Data order: (household debt, firm debt, GDP); identification order: (GDP, firm debt, household debt).
  P <- rbind(c(0, 0, 1),
             c(0, 1, 0),
             c(1, 0, 0))
  impact <- t(P) %*% t(chol(P %*% Sigma %*% t(P))) %*% P

  # The paper normalizes each shock to a one-unit impact response of its own variable.
  impact <- sweep(impact, 2, diag(impact), "/")

  companion <- matrix(0, n_y * p, n_y * p)
  companion[seq_len(n_y), ] <- t(beta[seq_len(n_y * p), , drop = FALSE])
  if (p > 1L) {
    companion[(n_y + 1L):(n_y * p),
              seq_len(n_y * (p - 1L))] <- diag(n_y * (p - 1L))
  }

  irf <- array(0, dim = c(horizon + 1L, n_y, n_y))
  transition <- diag(n_y * p)
  for (h in 0:horizon) {
    if (h > 0L) transition <- companion %*% transition
    irf[h + 1L, , ] <- transition[seq_len(n_y), seq_len(n_y)] %*% impact
  }
  irf
}

estimate_bias_corrected_beta <- function(Y, X_lag, fit_ols, group,
                                         group_sizes, p, n_boot,
                                         tol, update_step, max_iter,
                                         workers) {
  n_y <- ncol(Y)
  T_obs <- nrow(Y)
  n_group <- length(group_sizes)

  # Matches Matlab's detrend(res,'constant').
  centered_res <- fit_ols$residuals |>
    scale(center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)
  beta_trial <- fit_ols$beta

  for (iteration in seq_len(max_iter)) {
    message(sprintf("Bias-correction iteration %d: launching %d draws on %d workers ...",
                    iteration, n_boot, workers))

    beta_list <- seq_len(n_boot) |>
      parallel::mclapply(FUN = function(b) {
      # Observation-level signs reproduce the first-stage wild bootstrap.
      signs <- sample(c(-1, 1), T_obs, replace = TRUE)
      innovations_b <- centered_res * signs

      sim <- beta_trial |>
        simulate_panel(innovations_b, X_lag, group,
                       group_sizes, p, alpha = NULL)
      sim$Y |>
        fit_fe_var(sim$X, group, n_group) |>
        getElement("beta")
    }, mc.cores = workers, mc.preschedule = TRUE, mc.set.seed = TRUE)

    beta_draws <- beta_list |>
      unlist(use.names = FALSE) |>
      array(dim = c(n_y * p, n_y, n_boot))
    mean_beta_b <- beta_draws |>
      apply(c(1, 2), mean)
    difference  <- fit_ols$beta - mean_beta_b
    convergence <- (difference^2) |>
      mean() |>
      sqrt()
    message(sprintf("Bias-correction iteration %d: RMSE = %.6f",
                    iteration, convergence))

    if (convergence <= tol) break
    beta_trial <- beta_trial + update_step * difference
  }

  if (convergence > tol) {
    warning("Bias correction did not converge; consider increasing n_boot_bias.")
  }

  list(beta = beta_trial,
       bias = fit_ols$beta - beta_trial,
       convergence = convergence,
       iterations = iteration,
       n_boot = n_boot)
}

bootstrap_irf_ci <- function(Y, X_lag, year, group, group_sizes, p,
                             beta_bc, alpha_bc, residuals_bc,
                             estimated_bias, n_boot, horizon,
                             df_residual, workers) {
  n_y <- ncol(Y)
  T_obs <- nrow(Y)
  n_group <- length(group_sizes)
  all_years <- seq(min(year), max(year))

  # Matches the finite-sample residual scaling in the Matlab program.
  res_for_boot <- (residuals_bc * sqrt(T_obs / df_residual)) |>
    scale(center = TRUE, scale = FALSE)

  message(sprintf("IRF confidence intervals: launching %d draws on %d workers ...",
                  n_boot, workers))

  irf_list <- seq_len(n_boot) |>
    parallel::mclapply(FUN = function(b) {
    # A common sign within year preserves contemporaneous cross-country dependence.
    year_sign <- sample(c(-1, 1), length(all_years), replace = TRUE)
    signs <- year_sign[match(year, all_years)]
    innovations_b <- res_for_boot * signs

    sim <- beta_bc |>
      simulate_panel(innovations_b, X_lag, group,
                     group_sizes, p, alpha = alpha_bc)

    raw_fit <- sim$Y |>
      fit_fe_var(sim$X, group, n_group)
    beta_b_bc <- raw_fit$beta - estimated_bias

    # Matlab corrects lag coefficients but retains this draw's uncorrected fixed effects.
    residuals_b <- sim$Y - sim$X %*% beta_b_bc -
      raw_fit$alpha[group, , drop = FALSE]
    Sigma_b <- crossprod(residuals_b) / df_residual

    beta_b_bc |>
      cholesky_irf(Sigma_b, p, horizon)
  }, mc.cores = workers, mc.preschedule = TRUE, mc.set.seed = TRUE)

  irf_draws <- irf_list |>
    unlist(use.names = FALSE) |>
    array(dim = c(horizon + 1L, n_y, n_y, n_boot))
  message("IRF confidence-interval bootstrap completed.")

  list(lower = irf_draws |>
         apply(c(1, 2, 3), quantile, probs = 0.025, names = FALSE),
       upper = irf_draws |>
         apply(c(1, 2, 3), quantile, probs = 0.975, names = FALSE),
       n_boot = n_boot)
}
```

## 3. Read the authors' prepared VAR data

```{r data}
stopifnot(file.exists(input_file))

csv_in_zip <- paste0("MSV_ReplicationKit_20170307/Matlab/",
                     "VAR3_levels_fixedeffects_IVprctiles.csv")

# Both branches produce the same table, so downstream code is unchanged.
file_type <- input_file |>
  tools::file_ext() |>
  tolower()
if (file_type == "zip") {
  raw <- unz(input_file, csv_in_zip) |>
    read.csv(header = FALSE) |>
    as_tibble()
} else if (file_type == "csv") {
  raw <- input_file |>
    read.csv(header = FALSE) |>
    as_tibble()
} else {
  stop("input_file must point to the replication ZIP or VAR3_levels_fixedeffects_IVprctiles.csv.")
}

# Column positions are defined by the authors' headerless Matlab input.
country_id <- raw |>
  pull(V1)
year <- raw |>
  pull(V2)
Y <- raw |>
  select(V7:V9) |>
  as.matrix()
X_lag <- raw |>
  select(V10:V24) |>
  as.matrix()

colnames(Y) <- c("Household debt", "Firm debt", "Real GDP")

p <- 5L
horizon <- 10L
country_levels <- country_id |>
  unique()
group <- country_id |>
  match(country_levels)
group_sizes <- group |>
  tabulate(nbins = length(country_levels))
n_country <- country_levels |>
  length()
n_y <- Y |>
  ncol()
T_obs <- Y |>
  nrow()

n_parameters <- n_y * p + n_country
df_residual <- T_obs - n_parameters

stopifnot(n_country == 30L, ncol(X_lag) == n_y * p)
c(observations = T_obs, countries = n_country,
  first_year = min(year), last_year = max(year), workers = workers)
```

## 4. Estimate and bias-correct the panel VAR

```{r estimation}
fit_ols <- Y |>
  fit_fe_var(X_lag, group, n_country)

bias_result <- Y |>
  estimate_bias_corrected_beta(
  X_lag = X_lag, fit_ols = fit_ols,
  group = group, group_sizes = group_sizes, p = p,
  n_boot = n_boot_bias, tol = bias_tol,
  update_step = bias_step, max_iter = max_bias_iterations,
  workers = workers
)

beta_bc <- bias_result$beta

unexplained_bc <- Y - X_lag %*% beta_bc
alpha_bc <- unexplained_bc |>
  rowsum(group, reorder = FALSE) |>
  sweep(1, group_sizes, "/")
residuals_bc <- unexplained_bc - alpha_bc[group, , drop = FALSE]
Sigma_bc <- crossprod(residuals_bc) / df_residual

irf_point <- beta_bc |>
  cholesky_irf(Sigma_bc, p, horizon)
```

## 5. Construct 95% confidence intervals

```{r bootstrap-ci}
if (!exists("bias_result") ||
    is.null(bias_result$n_boot) ||
    bias_result$n_boot != n_boot_bias ||
    bias_result$convergence > bias_tol) {
  stop("Run all chunks: bias_result is stale, incomplete, or not converged.")
}

irf_ci <- Y |>
  bootstrap_irf_ci(
  X_lag = X_lag, year = year,
  group = group, group_sizes = group_sizes, p = p,
  beta_bc = beta_bc, alpha_bc = alpha_bc,
  residuals_bc = residuals_bc,
  estimated_bias = bias_result$bias,
  n_boot = n_boot_ci, horizon = horizon,
  df_residual = df_residual, workers = workers
)
```

## 6. Figure I

```{r figure-1, fig.cap="Impulse Responses from a Recursive VAR in Real GDP, Nonfinancial Firm Debt, and Household Debt"}
if (!exists("irf_ci") ||
    is.null(irf_ci$n_boot) ||
    irf_ci$n_boot != n_boot_ci) {
  stop("Run all chunks: irf_ci is stale or incomplete.")
}

h <- 0:horizon

old_par <- par(mfrow = c(1, 3), mar = c(4.1, 4.0, 2.8, 1.0),
               oma = c(0, 0, 0, 0), family = "serif",
               mgp = c(2.25, 0.7, 0), tcl = -0.25)

draw_panel <- function(response, shock, title, ylim,
                       xlab = "", show_legend = FALSE) {
  plot(h, irf_point[, response, shock], type = "o",
       pch = 16, cex = 0.55, lwd = 1.2,
       xlim = c(0, 10), ylim = ylim, xaxt = "n",
       xlab = xlab, ylab = "", main = title)
  axis(1, at = seq(0, 10, 2))
  lines(h, irf_ci$lower[, response, shock], lty = 2, lwd = 1.1)
  lines(h, irf_ci$upper[, response, shock], lty = 2, lwd = 1.1)

  if (show_legend) {
    legend("bottomleft", c("Impulse response", "95% CI"),
           lty = c(1, 2), pch = c(16, NA),
           pt.cex = 0.55, lwd = 1.1, bty = "o", cex = 0.75)
  }
}

# IRF array order is [horizon, response, shock].
draw_panel(response = 1, shock = 1,
           title = expression(d^{HH} %->% d^{HH}),
           ylim = c(-0.2, 1.8), show_legend = TRUE)

draw_panel(response = 3, shock = 1,
           title = expression(d^{HH} %->% y),
           ylim = c(-0.8, 0.6), xlab = "Years after impulse")

draw_panel(response = 3, shock = 2,
           title = expression(d^{F} %->% y),
           ylim = c(-0.5, 0.4))

par(old_par)
```
